title: Standing bus subscription (Signals · Delivery)
description: Persisted per-owner subscription driving the Signals feed, digests, and off-console delivery. Agent-malleable config: subscription.set/remove are ordinary audited ops; the UI menu and an agent edit the same store. Escalation per /task/709: interrupt reserved for p0/safety/principal-command.

pattern.description: Glob over emission type (doorman.*, task.created, ...). Server intersects with the owner's readable scopes.

tier.description: feed = pull-only; digest = batched per window; interrupt = off-console delivery (Matrix default).

loud.description: Promote-to-loud: delivers off-console even below interrupt tier.

owner.description: Principal id this subscription belongs to (per-user/per-agent).
